global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with engaging text and shapes.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to start binge-watching with a call to action.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The text 'Binge starts now Start free today' is presented in a clear, inviting font in the center.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now', inviting user interaction.
